protocol.name: wlr_virtual_pointer_unstable_v1

interface.name: zwlr_virtual_pointer_v1
interface.description: This protocol allows clients to emulate a physical pointer device.

entry.name: invalid_axis
entry.summary: client sent invalid axis enumeration value

entry.name: invalid_axis_source
entry.summary: client sent invalid axis source enumeration value

arg.name: value
arg.summary: length of vector in touchpad coordinates

description.summary: end of a pointer event sequence

arg.name: axis
arg.summary: the axis stopped with this event

arg.name: value
arg.summary: length of vector in touchpad coordinates

interface.name: zwlr_virtual_pointer_manager_v1
interface.description: This object allows clients to create individual virtual pointer objects.
